included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Drive to Coorg & Bylakuppe Golden Temple
itinerary.description: Drive from your starting city to Coorg. En route, stop to marvel at the massive golden statues of Namdroling Monastery in Bylakuppe. Check-in at your resort.

itinerary.title: Abbey Falls, Coffee Plantations & Mysore Palace
itinerary.description: Visit the beautiful Abbey Falls and take a walk in a lush coffee plantation. In the afternoon, drive to Mysore to tour the historic Mysore Palace and Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Wonderla Theme Park Adventure
itinerary.description: Travel to the world-class Wonderla Amusement Park. Spend the day enjoying high-thrill rollercoasters, family rides, and refreshing water slides before departure.

title: Coorg & Mysore: Hills, Heritage & Thrills
description: A fantastic 3-day journey from the misty coffee plantations of Coorg to the historic palaces of Mysore and the thrilling adventure rides of Wonderla. Visit elephant camps, Buddhist monasteries, royal palaces, and experience high-speed waterslides.
highlights: Walk through the fragrant coffee estates and waterfalls of Coorg
Visit the Namdroling Monastery (Golden Temple) in Bylakuppe
Tour the historic Mysore Palace and Brindavan Gardens
Enjoy a full day of entertainment at Wonderla Amusement Park
